# S'Estepa Design

> Landscape architecture and garden design studio in Mallorca, Spain. Founded in 1999 by Pedro Campaner (CEO & Founder), led by Pedro Campaner and Sofia Grimaux (Project Manager). Over 30 years creating Mediterranean gardens for private estates, fincas, and villas across Mallorca, Ibiza, and Menorca.

S'Estepa Design (legal name: S'Estepa Jardineria Integral SL) is a full-service landscape studio based in Inca, Mallorca. The studio carries the complete project lifecycle: concept design, 2D scaled plans, 3D renders, garden construction, dry-stone walling, technical irrigation, planting, and year-round care. The studio is known for its work on large estate gardens, including a 10,000 m² finca in Campos and a 32,000 m² private estate in Mallorca. Services are delivered in English, Spanish, and German.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://design.sestepa.com/): Studio overview, featured projects, and contact
- [Garden Design Mallorca — Services](https://design.sestepa.com/garden-design-mallorca-landscape-management-villas-fincas/): Full service offering
- [Portfolio](https://design.sestepa.com/portfolio/): All completed garden projects
- [About the Studio](https://design.sestepa.com/about/): History, team, and philosophy
- [Press](https://design.sestepa.com/press/): Media coverage and publications
- [Contact](https://design.sestepa.com/contact/): Free initial consultation booking

## Featured projects

- [Finca Garden Campos](https://design.sestepa.com/finca-garden-campos/): 10,000 m² estate garden — flagship project
- [Sant Llorenç Estate](https://design.sestepa.com/sant-llorenc/): Large private estate with pool landscape
- [Crestatx Sustainable Garden](https://design.sestepa.com/crestatx-garden-design/): Native species, zero-irrigation design
- [Palma Terrace Garden](https://design.sestepa.com/terrace-garden-in-palma/): Urban rooftop garden design
